title: crotalaria occulta
intro: Crotalaria occulta is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, known for its ability to thrive in arid environments and its unique, umbrella-like seed pods. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria occulta include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared by making a decoction from its leaves and seeds, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application.
